change_request_submitted.subject: New change request
change_request_submitted.body: A new change request has been submitted and is awaiting your review.

change_request_approved.subject: Change request approved
change_request_approved.body: Your change request has been approved.

change_request_rejected.subject: Change request rejected
change_request_rejected.body: Your change request has been rejected.

change_request_changes_requested.subject: Changes requested
change_request_changes_requested.body: A reviewer requested changes on your request. Please edit and resubmit.

change_request_published.subject: Change request published
change_request_published.body: Your change request has been approved and published to the tree.

change_request_expiring.subject: Change request expiring soon
change_request_expiring.body: Your change request will expire soon. Please act before it closes.

change_request_expired.subject: Change request expired
change_request_expired.body: Your change request has expired and was closed automatically.

change_request_conflict.subject: Change request conflict
change_request_conflict.body: The target was modified after your request was created, so it could not be applied. Please re-draft.
